_notes: Source: tk-soft-practitioner (clinical). Target: iit-proj-practitioner (research, extreme blinding). Target bans name.given, telecom, and address for practitioner de-identification. Mandatory registration extension in source has no equivalent in target. Target adds optional research-role extension.

drifts.description: Mandatory extension registrationNumber[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target. Source required this extension; target does not define it.
New optional extension researchRole[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
name cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*] (inherits R4 base). Min decreased from 1 to 0. MustSupport preserved in both.
name.family cardinality relaxed from [1..1 mustSupport=true] to [0..1 mustSupport=false] (target inherits R4 base). Min decreased and MustSupport removed.

name.given cardinality changed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..0]. name.given completely banned in target for practitioner blinding. Source required at least one given name; target prohibits it.
telecom cardinality changed: source [0..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..0]. telecom completely banned in target for practitioner blinding.
address cardinality changed: source [0..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..0]. address completely banned in target for practitioner blinding.
MustSupport removed on birthDate (source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain birthDate, inherits R4 base [0..1 mustSupport=false]).
qualification cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*] (target inherits R4 base min=0). Min decreased. MustSupport preserved in both.

MustSupport removed on qualification.code (source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain qualification.code in differential; both inherit R4 base [1..1 mustSupport=false]). Required element with MustSupport removed.
